title: seriphidium terrae-albae var. suaveolens
intro: Seriphidium terrae-albae var. suaveolens, also known as White Wormwood, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of White Wormwood include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. White Wormwood can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
